metadata.sysdescription: Helios has an infamous history. In 2240 it was the center ofa hegemony superweapon, The Planet was deemed a class 6 Bio Hazard and is uninhabited to this day, the uncounted millions who perished are memorialized in an orbital station, with a large habitation complex holding many of the former citizens. As a boarder system it sees moderate traffic and is a hive of smuggling though has little piracy.

Zarkov Labs.description: A Secritive Private Corporation. This Lab is licensed to perfom Biological experiments up to level 5 Hazard.

Helios Memorial.description: This Station is In High Orbit of Helios and houses a Vistors center, museum and

1769283109927.name: Planet Helios
1769283109927.description:
DANGER CLASS 6 BIOHAZARD
This planet has been hit by a Hegemony Superweapon. it no longer suports Sapient Life.

FCS1.description: Auto-surveyed fuel collection zone. Estimated radius: 11,231 units. Local nebular density index: 162.7. Source field: Nebula Arc 14. Survey profile: bright ion trails with usable condenser feedstock; field stability patchy near the edge; collector saturation estimate 63%. Telemetry confidence: high. Keep condenser temperature margins high during extended collection.

FCS2.description: Auto-surveyed fuel collection zone. Estimated radius: 11,092 units. Local nebular density index: 111.7. Source field: Nebula Arc 15. Survey profile: charged nebular wisps with intermittent fuel-cell precursors; field stability lightly turbulent; collector saturation estimate 90%. Telemetry confidence: high. Keep condenser temperature margins high during extended collection.

FCS3.description: Auto-surveyed fuel collection zone. Estimated radius: 11,515 units. Local nebular density index: 99.2. Source field: Nebula Field 7. Survey profile: hydrogen-rich vapor with low metallic dust; field stability slowly drifting; collector saturation estimate 53%. Telemetry confidence: high. Cycle filters often; particulate load may spike without warning.

FCS6.description: Auto-surveyed fuel collection zone. Estimated radius: 10,713 units. Local nebular density index: 63.4. Source field: Nebula Arc 11. Survey profile: volatile ice fines suspended in a quiet plasma band; field stability lightly turbulent; collector saturation estimate 38%. Telemetry confidence: high. Short passes should outperform a single static collection burn.

FCS7.description: Auto-surveyed fuel collection zone. Estimated radius: 9,001 units. Local nebular density index: 46.9. Source field: Nebula Field 8. Survey profile: cool deuterium traces threaded through ionized gas; field stability dense around the core; collector saturation estimate 52%. Telemetry confidence: moderate. Hold station near the inner third for the cleanest skim.
